title: fix(pods): preserve Codex compaction egress hosts
body:
Summary
- Force Codex/OpenAI runtime provider hosts `chatgpt.com` and `*.chatgpt.com` even when `networkPolicy.replaceDefaults` is true.
- Stop auto-injecting GitHub hosts from runtime defaults; GitHub remains profile-controlled.
- Add the recovered spec and regression contract from `comparable-sparrow`.

Validation
- `npx pnpm --filter @autopod/daemon test -- runtime-network-defaults.test.ts`
- `npx biome check packages/daemon/src/pods/runtime-network-defaults.ts packages/daemon/src/pods/runtime-network-defaults.test.ts`
- `npx pnpm build`
- `npx pnpm test`

Note: `npx pnpm lint` currently fails on tracked `.speclint-cache/llm/*.json` formatting in fresh `origin/main`; that is unrelated to this PR.
